title: Ascendency Path of Dusk
atAGlance: A dimlight path that blurs intentions, weakens enemy certainty, and enables surgical takedowns.
sageNotes: Dusk adepts wield uncertainty like steel, clouding intent until enemies choose the wrong answer. Their strength is surgical pressure: break certainty, then strike with precision. In alley feuds and tunnel war alike, a Dusk bearer is remembered less for spectacle than for exact timing.
gameInformation: Designed for rogues, bards, and control hybrids. Typical effects include mark suppression, reaction taxes, and concealment-triggered riders.
